title: Boundless Peace
definition: A state of inner tranquility, harmony, and bliss.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A feeling of deep, peaceful happiness that comes from a connection with something greater than oneself.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An experiential state characterized by the dissolution of individual boundaries and the realization of unity with the universe.
difficulty_levels.expert: A transcendental condition where the subject experiences the annihilation of the ego, merging with the infinite and attaining a profound sense of peace, happiness, and oneness.

extra_fields.insight: The idea that everyone has access to this boundless peace but may not have the framework to recognize or experience it.
